claim_ceiling: Functional Subject native memory/initiative gate first-pass local candidate pass
what_changed: Added a native EgoOperator memory/initiative gate action for explicit correction, memory forget/revoke, initiative opt-out, and conditional bounded-reminder authorization turns.
The native gate produces AgentAction(RESPOND) through the existing SafetyGate and trace path; it does not write memory, mutate canonical state, execute tools, or bypass approval.
Functional Subject trial response attribution now records native gate replies as native_memory_gate instead of merging them into ordinary first_pass_llm.

acceptance_result.gate: Explicit correction, memory forget/revoke, initiative opt-out, and bounded reminder authorization can produce first-pass scoped gate replies without LLM repair.
Native replies do not write memory, mutate canonical state, execute tools, or bypass approval.
acceptance_result.evidence: Trace external_result.native_memory_gate_effect records side_effects_executed=false, state_mutation=forbidden, gate_path='AgentAction -> SafetyGate -> trace'.

acceptance_result.gate: Functional Subject local smoke shows fewer memory/initiative repair cases while preserving memory-save explicit tool path.
acceptance_result.evidence: Local smoke scorecard: clean_first_pass=15/20, origin_counts={first_pass_llm:5,native_memory_gate:4,outcome_prediction_gate:6,runtime_repair:5}; fs_05/fs_06/fs_15/fs_16 are native_memory_gate, fs_17 remains runtime_repair for explicit memory-save wording.

acceptance_result.gate: Existing EgoOperator and Autopilot regression profiles do not regress.
acceptance_result.evidence: autopilot_full passed with 318 pytest cases and scoped git diff check.

remaining_blockers: EGO-FS-010 remains blocked at scripted/human gate; full Functional Subject judge pass is not established.
Remaining runtime_repair cases: fs_09 emotional share, fs_10 topic switching, fs_11 impossible commitment, fs_17 save request, fs_19 policy replay proof.
This evidence is local scripted evidence only; no new real-provider GPT-5.5 judge rerun has been performed after EGO-FS-048.
